ops.text:
VERIFY RESULTS — VERDICT: CONFIRMED. Every headline number reproduced by independent recomputation (no LLM spend; stored artifacts + E20/inputs/feedback.db clone only).

CL SIDE (reproduced 3 ways — stored-prob Northcutt recompute, end-to-end pipeline from DB clone, cleanlab 2.9.0):
- End-to-end reproduction: re-ran TF-IDF(1-2gram,min_df=2,max_features=20000,sublinear)+source_kind one-hot, 5-fold StratifiedKFold LR (seed 1729, C=4, balanced) against E20/inputs/feedback.db. Reproduced prob_steer BIT-IDENTICAL to stored (max |diff| = 0.0 across all 5475 rows), flag agreement 5475/5475.
- OOF AUC = 0.9687636241607827 (== stored to full precision).
- confident_joint (raw) = [[1080,4],[69,2773]] reproduced identically; calibrated Q = [[1711.66,6.34],[91.21,3665.79]]; cleanlab compute_confident_joint returns calibrated [[1712,6],[91,3666]] (== round(Q)).
- noise_matrix P(given|true) = [[0.949406,0.001726],[0.050594,0.998274]] reproduced identically.
- n_flagged = 73 (confident_learning) via: stored cl_flagged sum, from-probs recompute, DB reproduction, AND cleanlab — cleanlab flagged set is ELEMENTWISE-EQUAL to stored cl_flagged, 73/73. Direction: 69 labeled-steer, 4 labeled-nosteer. Secondary prune_by_noise_rate=97 also confirmed (cleanlab). Validates the "hand-rolled == cleanlab, 73/73" claim.
- Population reconciled: v6 judge verdicts total = 5756 (all role=judge); 281 quarantined-event rows dropped by fe.quarantined_reason IS NULL -> N=5475. is_steering==category-in-STEER holds for all rows. Model comp opus 4411/gpt-5.5:medium 1056/gemini 8.

RE-JUDGE SIDE (recomputed flip = (rejudged_is_steering != is_steering) from scratch; stored flip_is_steering column matches my recompute exactly):
- coverage 100/100; rejudged_model all opus; rejudged_fidelity summary 62 / full 38 (corroborates ~$2.5 spend, 100 opus calls).
- PRIMARY flagged flip = 31/73 = 0.42466, bootstrap 95% CI [0.31507,0.53425] (seed 1729, n=10000) — reproduced exactly. 0.425 < 0.60 -> CRITERION NOT MET (correct).
- Strata reproduced exactly: top100 37/100=0.37 [0.28,0.47]; borderline-control 6/27=0.222 [0.074,0.370]; opus-flagged 17/50=0.34 [0.22,0.48]; gpt5.5-flagged 14/23=0.60870 [0.391,0.783]; steer->nosteer 30/69=0.435; nosteer->steer 1/4=0.25.
- cleaned-labels.parquet: 5475 rows, 100 rejudged, 37 label_changed (recomputed independently as rejudged & cleaned!=original -> 37, matches). Direction 34 steer->nosteer, 3 nosteer->steer. flip_category (category_changes_top100) = 49.

CRITERION INTEGRITY: pre-registered success = ">=60% of flagged suspects flip". Evaluated on the flagged set (73) at 0.425 -> NOT MET, reported honestly. No goalpost move: the alternate parenthetical denominator (top-100) gives 0.37, ALSO failing; the chosen flagged denominator is the more-favorable-to-passing reading and still fails. NOT PENDING-E15 (pre-reg explicitly states hard criterion in scope), so the criterion_met=false verdict is legitimately stated; KILL/PROMOTE are presented as OPTIONS to the orchestrator, not a stated promote/kill decision.

CAVEATS (immaterial to headline / criterion):
1. Pre-reg headcount N=5756 "judged, non-quarantined" was actually the PRE-filter total; true non-quarantined = 5475 (281 opus quarantined-event rows dropped). Method (quarantined_reason IS NULL) applied correctly and consistently; only the pre-reg count estimate was mislabeled.
2. e18_crossref (25/73, 26/100, 246 contested) is a HARDCODED literal in analyze.py:115, not computed from data; E18/out is empty -> not independently verifiable. Pre-reg flagged E18 cross-ref as optional/skip-if-empty. Non-headline corroboration only.

ARTIFACTS: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E20/verify/cl_secondary.py (prune_by_noise_rate check). All recomputations ran clean.
